function.name: bookAppointment
function.description: Confirm and book the appointment after the caller has selected a slot from the availability results. Generates a confirmation number and logs the booking.

phone.description: Caller's callback phone number, including area code

slot_description.description: Human-readable description of the chosen slot, e.g. 'Wednesday, May 28 at 2:00 PM'

notes.description: Email, new/returning status, how they heard about BHRC, and any other relevant details
